CVE-2014-8878.title: KDE KMail does not encrypt attachments in emails when "automatic  ...
CVE-2014-8878.description: KDE KMail does not encrypt attachments in emails when "automatic encryption" is enabled, which allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information by sniffing the network.

CVE-2017-17689.title: The S/MIME specification allows a Cipher Block Chaining (CBC) mal ...
CVE-2017-17689.description: The S/MIME specification allows a Cipher Block Chaining (CBC) malleability-gadget attack that can indirectly lead to plaintext exfiltration, aka EFAIL.

CVE-2017-9604.title: KDE kmail before 5.5.2 and messagelib before 5.5.2, as distribute ...
CVE-2017-9604.description: KDE kmail before 5.5.2 and messagelib before 5.5.2, as distributed in KDE Applications before 17.04.2, do not ensure that a plugin's sign/encrypt action occurs during use of the Send Later feature, which allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information by sniffing the network.

CVE-2021-38373.title: In KDE KMail 19.12.3 (aka 5.13.3), the SMTP STARTTLS option is no ...
CVE-2021-38373.description: In KDE KMail 19.12.3 (aka 5.13.3), the SMTP STARTTLS option is not honored (and cleartext messages are sent) unless "Server requires authentication" is checked.
